name: Wonder Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. MEASURE MARGARINE, CHOCOLATE MORSELS, CORN SYRUP, and VANILLA into a large saucepan.
2. COOK OVER LOW HEAT, STIRRING CONSTANTLY until smooth.
3. REMOVE FROM HEAT.
4. MIX IN SUGAR.
5. ADD CEREAL.
6. STIR UNTIL WELL COATED.
7. PRESS INTO BUTTERED 8" X 8" PAN.
8. CHILL.
